spec_match.rationale: Live install-context probe is correctly framed as surrounding context while the migration checklist now names the actual manifest-driven fields: id, migrate_from, and allow_migration.

interactive.rationale: Dynamically reads environment variables to probe standard client capabilities, displaying context and matching link tags cleanly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the updated parent listing by explaining the current manifest-driven migration handshake.

edge_cases.rationale: Safely detects getInstalledRelatedApps, separates unsupported API fallback from migration support, and covers suggest versus force behavior in the checklist.

references.rationale: Lays out the tracking ChromeStatus link correctly under see also.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful layout utilizing nice flat card tables, dashed dividers, and clear step indicators.

summary: Re-reviewed after clarifying that getInstalledRelatedApps is only an install-context probe and updating the migration steps to the current migrate_from / allow_migration contract.
